ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the station */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the station is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state where the station is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email for station contact for maintenance and inquiries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_observations" (
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather observation */,
  "station_id" TEXT /* ID of the weather station that made the observation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the observation */,
  "time_of_observation" TEXT /* Time of the observation */,
  "awnd" REAL /* Average wind speed */,
  "prcp" REAL /* Total precipitation */,
  "snow" REAL /* Total snowfall */,
  "tavg" REAL /* Average temperature */,
  "tmax" REAL /* Maximum temperature */,
  "tmin" REAL /* Minimum temperature */,
  "data_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data format used for the observation */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag to indicate the quality of the data (e.g., reliable, questionable) */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used for the observation */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_observations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_observations_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES years ("year_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_observations_data_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_observations_month FOREIGN KEY ("month") REFERENCES months ("month_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year for which data is collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate metric (e.g., temperature, precipitation) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the climate metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the climate metric */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., numeric, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_station_metrics" (
  "station_id" TEXT /* ID of the weather station */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the climate metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the metric was recorded */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag to indicate the quality of the metric data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id", "metric_id", "date", "time")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "station_id" TEXT /* ID of the weather station accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension associated with the format */,
  "is_compressed" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the data format supports compression */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)
